questionHtml:
Laetitia runs a travel agency in Melba. The elevator to her office is designed to hold a maximum of 8 people.

Write down a probability distribution that models the total weight of 8 adults chosen independently and at random from Melba.
markschemeHtml:
let W be the random variable the total weight of a sample of eight people

W~N576, 8×102                    A1A1A1

Note: Award A1 for normal distribution; A1 correct mean; A1 correct variance or SD SD=28.2842….

[3 marks]

meta.title: Write down a probability distribution that models the total weight of 8 adults chosen independently and at random from Melba.
breadcrumbLabels: AHL 4.14—Linear transformation of a single RV, E(X) and VAR(X), unbiased estimators
